overlay-scrim._comment: Minimal token set for the standalone OrigamOverlayScrim component. Background resolves via the same alias as overlay.scrim.background-color — pending arbitration #2 resolution (color.overlay.scrim vs future color.overlay.backdrop).

background-color.$description: Arbitrage: aliased to color.overlay.scrim (black in dark / white in light). Traditional backdrops need a dark scrim in both themes — rename to color.overlay.backdrop once arbitration #2 resolved.

backdrop-filter.$description: #253 — matière hook for the Dialog/Overlay scrim (the « page dépolie » design).
